phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la biglietteria dei traghetti, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh doh-VEH lah bee-lyet-teh-REE-ah day tra-GET-tee per fa-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: La biglietteria è vicino all'imbarcadero, a destra.
likely_response.pronunciation: LAH beej-lee-eht-teh-REE-ah È vee-CHEE-noh ahll-'eem-bahr-kah-DEH-roh AH DEH-strah
likely_response.translation_en: The ticket office is near the landing stage, on the right.

responses.english: The ticket office is near the landing stage, on the right.
responses.phonetic: LAH beej-lee-eht-teh-REE-ah È vee-CHEE-noh ahll-'eem-bahr-kah-DEH-roh AH DEH-strah
responses.french: La biglietteria è vicino all'imbarcadero, a destra.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, l'ufficio informazioni è aperto oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, loof-FEE-choh een-for-mah-TSYOH-neh EH ah-PEHR-toh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Bisogna pagare per usare i bagni?
phrases.pronunciation: bee-ZOH-nyah pah-GAH-reh pehr oo-ZAH-reh ee BAH-nyee

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, one euro at the cashier.

responses.english: Yes, one euro at the cashier.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, qual è il punto migliore per foto?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee kwahl EH eel POON-toh mee-LYOH-reh pehr FOH-toh

likely_response.local: Dal lato del lago, vicino alla fontana.
likely_response.pronunciation: DAHL LAH-toh DEHL LAH-goh vee-CHEE-noh AHL-lah fohn-TAH-nah
likely_response.translation_en: From the lake side, near the fountain.

responses.english: From the lake side, near the fountain.
responses.phonetic: DAHL LAH-toh DEHL LAH-goh vee-CHEE-noh AHL-lah fohn-TAH-nah
responses.french: Dal lato del lago, vicino alla fontana.
